channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: Jalang’o Nairobi Matatu Culture Case Moves to Court
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: MP Jalang’o has moved to court to protect Nairobi matatu culture and graffiti to preserve local heritage for fans. Read the full story.
item.content:encoded: MP Jalang’o has moved to court to protect Nairobi matatu culture and graffiti to preserve local heritage for fans. Read the full story.

item.title: HBO restores Lanterns trailer after music license expiration
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Green Lanterns Trailer Drama Unveiled HBO's highly anticipated "Lanterns" trailer briefly vanished from online platforms this week. The teaser has since reappeared, now confirming an August 16 premiere on HBO Max. The reason? Not fan speculation about...

item.title: Home Afrika reports profit as liabilities exceed total assets
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Home Afrika Reports Profitability Amidst Significant Liabilities Home Afrika Limited reported a net profit of KSh 117.89 million for the full year ended December 31, 2025, marking its second consecutive year of profitability. Despite a top-line contraction,...
item.content:encoded: Home Afrika Reports Profitability Amidst Significant Liabilities Home Afrika Limited reported a net profit of KSh 117.89 million for the full year ended December 31, 2025, marking its second consecutive year of profitability. Despite a top-line contraction,...

item.title: Confirmed: Bomas Convention Centre Set for September Completion

item.content:encoded: Muranga University student Consolata Githinji, 22, died in Kileleshwa after a 6th-floor Airbnb fall. Tony Odhiambo arrested; police investigation underway.
